ddls:
CREATE TABLE "restaurants" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restaurant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the restaurant */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the restaurant's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the restaurant's location */,
  "price_range" TEXT /* Price range of the restaurant */,
  "cuisine_type" TEXT /* Type of cuisine served */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the restaurant */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the restaurant */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the restaurant */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the restaurant's image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the restaurant */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the restaurant is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user, restaurant owner) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "email_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's email has been verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who left the review */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant being reviewed */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was left */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the review has received */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the review has received */,
  "flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review has been flagged */,
  "moderation_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant being rated */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the restaurant */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the restaurant */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was last updated */,
  "num_five_star_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of 5-star reviews */,
  "num_four_star_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of 4-star reviews */,
  "num_three_star_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of 3-star reviews */,
  "num_two_star_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of 2-star reviews */,
  "num_one_star_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of 1-star reviews */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurant_owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restaurant owner */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant owned */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant owner */,
  "owner_email" TEXT /* Email address of the restaurant owner */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the restaurant owner */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the owner account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the owner's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the owner account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurant_owners_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant being claimed */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant owner making the claim */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the claim status (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES restaurant_owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant being tracked */,
  "total_views" INTEGER /* Total views for the restaurant */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total reviews for the restaurant */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating for the restaurant */,
  "monthly_views" INTEGER /* Number of views per month */,
  "monthly_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews per month */,
  "monthly_rating_changes" REAL /* Changes in average rating per month */,
  "user_demographics" TEXT /* Demographic data of the users (e.g., age, location) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)
